query: SELECT id, categoryName, brandName, subtypeCode, active FROM product_categories WHERE categoryName LIKE '%耳機%' OR categoryName LIKE '%音響%' OR brandName LIKE '%Samsung%' ORDER BY categoryName, brandName, id; SELECT id, categoryName, brandName, label, active, sourceRowNumber FROM product_name_catalog_entries WHERE categoryName LIKE '%耳機%' OR categoryName LIKE '%音響%' OR brandName LIKE '%Samsung%' ORDER BY categoryName, brandName, sourceRowNumber LIMIT 200;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT id, categoryName, brandName, subtypeCode, active FROM product_categories WHERE categoryName LIKE '%耳機%' OR categoryName LIKE '%音響%' OR brandName LIKE '%Samsung%' ORDER BY categoryName, brandName, id; SELECT id, categoryName, brandName, label, active, sourceRowNumber FROM product_name_catalog_entries WHERE categoryName LIKE '%耳機%' OR categoryName LIKE '%音響%' OR brandName LIKE '%Samsung%' ORDER BY categoryName, brandName, sourceRowNumber LIMIT 200;
